mapper.sql: SELECT e.*, d.name as department_name, p.name as position_name FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON e.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN position p ON e.position_id = p.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employee (employee_no, name, gender, birth_date, phone, email, id_card, address, department_id, position_id, hire_date, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{employeeNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{birthDate}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{idCard}, #{address}, #{departmentId}, #{positionId}, #{hireDate}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE employee SET employee_no = #{employeeNo}, name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, birth_date = #{birthDate}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, id_card = #{idCard}, address = #{address}, department_id = #{departmentId}, position_id = #{positionId}, hire_date = #{hireDate}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE employee_no = #{employeeNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE employee_no = #{employeeNo} AND id != #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employee WHERE department_id = #{departmentId}
